title: W025 TreeCalc structural and formula substrate widening
description: Tracking anchor for the reached-gate TreeCalc substrate packet. Ordinary execution truth now lives in the workset register and bead graph rather than the workset doc itself.

title: W026 TreeCalc OxFml bind/reference and seam intake
description: Tracking anchor for the reached-gate first TreeCalc consumed-seam packet. This preserves the executed seam floor without reopening W026 for ordinary execution tracking.

title: W032 OxCalc beads migration and light doctrine reorientation
description: Closed migration packet that introduced WORKSET_REGISTER, BEADS, the bead workspace, the lightweight workset index, and the retired blocker-surface rule.

title: W028 TreeCalc evaluator-backed candidate result integration
description: Execution target for widening TreeCalc candidate-result, reject, and publication integration on top of the reached W026 seam packet and the dependency substrate realized by W027.

title: W029 TreeCalc runtime-derived effects and overlay closure
description: Execution target for broader runtime-derived family realization and overlay closure beyond the W026 minimum transport packet.

title: W030 TreeCalc corpus/oracle and first sequential baseline
description: Execution target for the first broader TreeCalc corpus, oracle, and sequential baseline evidence wave after the dependency, candidate, and runtime-effect floors are widened.

title: W031 TreeCalc assurance refresh and residual packetization
description: Execution target for the first TreeCalc assurance refresh and residual packetization wave after the sequential baseline is in place.

title: W027 TreeCalc dependency graph and invalidation closure
description: Active execution target for first-class dependency graph build, reverse-edge truth, invalidation closure, and replay-visible dependency diagnostics on the TreeCalc proving lane.

title: Lock W027 first realized dependency substrate floor
description: Update the W027 packet and active doctrine surfaces so they truthfully describe the already-realized dependency graph, reverse-edge, cycle-group, invalidation-closure, and replay-visible artifact floor beneath the OxCalcTree host contract. Closure evidence is the updated docs plus passing oxcalc-core tests.
close_reason: Locked the first exercised W027 dependency substrate floor in the packet and planning surfaces, and added narrow runtime guards so rebind-required and missing-target reruns reject instead of publishing against stale dependency state.

title: Widen replay-visible dependency identity beyond current local edge ids
description: Advance W027 from the current local deterministic edge-id floor to a stronger replay-visible dependency-identity packet where needed by later TreeCalc packets.

title: Expand invalidation-cause and closure evidence across non-structural seeds
description: Widen W027 evidence from the current structural invalidation-seed floor to broader upstream publication and dependency-change closure cases with emitted artifacts and tests.
close_reason: Added engine-model tests and emitted-artifact JSON tests for UpstreamPublication and DependencyAdded/Removed/Reclassified, and synced W027 planning surfaces to the broader first non-structural invalidation evidence floor.
